hooks.command: IN="$(cat)"; case "$IN" in *'"stop_hook_active":true'*|*'"stop_hook_active": true'*) exit 0;; esac; S="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/platform/scripts/ci/check-cohort-floor-coverage.mjs"; [ -f "$S" ] || S="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/ci/check-cohort-floor-coverage.mjs"; [ -f "$S" ] || exit 0; command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; OUT="$(node "$S" --static 2>&1)" || { echo "BLOCKED (done must == green): a cohort-spanning aggregate RPC has no verifiable k-anon floor. Route it through public.k_anon_distribution, add a pgTAP floor test, or log it in scripts/ci/.cohort-floor-coverage-allowlist.txt." >&2; echo "$OUT" >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0
